MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Sep-26-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shirley Sheikhzadeh, 415-724-4524, appearaing for pro per plaintiff Ali Sheikhzadeh for Plaintiff.

Matter was not properly contested. Court addresses party appearing on behalf of plaintiff Ali Sheikhzadeh and advises her that she does not have standing to appear on plaintiff's behalf.

Not ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LIBERTY MUTUAL FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Defendant's unopposed "motion to compel arbitration and to stay" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
